title: Affirm (AFRM) Q4 Earnings Preview
text: Affirm (AFRM) Q4 Earnings Preview. Earnings Report Details: Affirm is scheduled to report Q4 fiscal 2024 results on August 28, 2024. The consensus estimate projects a loss of 45 cents per share, representing a 34.8% improvement year-over-year, with expected revenues of $599.5 million, up 34.5% from the prior year. Positive Indicators: The company shows a +19.64% Earnings Surprise Probability, suggesting potential for beating expectations. Travel and entertainment spending drove resilience in the quarter. Growth metrics look promising: active consumer growth expected at 13.8% year-over-year, with merchant network revenues projected at $167 million (up 17.8%). Interest income is anticipated to surge 51.6% to $325.7 million, primarily from pricing initiatives and the elevated interest rate environment. The company's gross merchandise volume guidance of $6.75-$6.95 billion signals meaningful growth from $5.5 billion annually. Headwinds: Rising operational costs present challenges. Transaction costs are expected between $335-$345 million, significantly higher than last year's $264 million. The stock has declined 39.4% year-to-date and trades at 3.21X forward sales—above the industry average of 1.20X. Investment Recommendation: Analysts recommend a Hold stance. Existing shareholders may maintain positions given long-term BNPL market potential, while prospective investors should await a more favorable entry point following earnings results.
